title: Table widget - set default view to collapse groups
excerpt:
We would love to be able to set the default view for the table widget to show all boards/groups collapsed. The current setup has every group in every board expanded on initial view. 
We use the dashboard table widget a l…

posts.author: KyleDanielle (Kyle Seem)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would love to be able to set the default view for the table widget to show all boards/groups collapsed. The current setup has every group in every board expanded on initial view.

We use the dashboard table widget a lot, and there are always several boards on a dashboard. Being able to see all the boards (names) on the initial view and then expanding the boards and groups as needed would be better than having to collapse everything or scroll forever to get to whichever board we want to access first.

posts.author: mx8mx (Tobi)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree, i would like to see the same feature. We have the same content but in a lot of groups on the same board and jumping into the board, it would help if we could save the collapsed view to see just the groups, all at once. if i found the group i’m looking for, i can expand it. Just imagine it like using a FAQ on a website.

posts.author: vallesj (Jorge Valles)
posts.cookedHtml: yes, this is a very useful feature to add, because when you got several groups and items per group, the teammates could get lost or confused with so much lines on their screens.

posts.author: Jorge (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml: Or at least, save whatever the last view was, which I think happens sometimes but not all of the time. This is kinda driving me nuts right now…

posts.author: KarenA (Karen Aiken)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed - I’d even like to specify certain groups (recently passed sprints or quarters) to start out closed by default. It’s maddening to have to close / scroll every time I re-enter the board or view.

These are groups I’m not quite ready to move to the bottom of the board - they’re recent history.

posts.author: BronwynWest (Bronwyn West)
posts.cookedHtml: In addition to this request, it would be great to be able to allow a customised view of ‘My work’ so that you can add additional columns etc
